$comment: Copilot-relevant workspace settings. Checked in so the whole team gets the same behavior.
$comment_instructions: Make sure instruction files are picked up from .github/instructions/
$comment_commit: Repo-specific guidance for generated commit messages.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use conventional commits (feat/fix/refactor/test/docs). Subject <= 72 chars, imperative mood. Body explains WHY, references the ticket ID from the branch name.

$comment_review: Repo-specific guidance applied when Copilot reviews code in the editor.
